title: ornithogalum chinense
intro: Ornithogalum chinense, also known as the Naked Lady or Star of Bethlehem, is a flowering plant native to China, characterized by its white, bell-shaped flowers and sword-shaped leaves. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Ornithogalum chinense include its ability to relieve fever, reduce swelling, and soothe digestive issues, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Ornithogalum chinense typically involve drying and processing the plant's roots and flowers, which can be made into teas, capsules, or infusions for medicinal use.
